title: Morellian Enforcers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Morellian Enforcers''' were an elite group of soldiers and protectors who guarded the [[Morellian Commonwealth/Legends|Morellian Commonwealth]].

Morellian Enforcers used a limited technology, preferring to rely on their natural resources. Usual gear included leather boots, blackstrap gloves, [[Morellian oilcoat]] and the [[Morellian Weapons Conglomerate]] [[.48-caliber Enforcer pistol]].

Morellian [[Barosa Warren]] was a member of the Morellian Enforcers before becoming a scout for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].
